reviews.review_description: why in the crafting area there's a coconut but there isn't a coconut

developer_response.body: You found a secret! Keep an eye out in the next update

reviews.review_description: Only been playing for a bit of time but I’m already in love! This game is so cutesy, I can see myself spending a lot more time on this. The dialogue is refreshingly silly, the mechanics all around are amazing, I love how crafting works! I really hope this game takes off as it deserves to! Looking forward to playing the rest of the game, and hopefully updates as well!

The Veggies are so cute and soothing. In addition, throwing cookies helps me a lot relieve stress.
I hope that in future updates, the details of the terrarium furniture will be improved and we'll be able to arrange them in a three-dimensional way.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Yes, an update for the terrarium furniture is in the works. Feel free to email liza@meepengine.com if you have any more feedback or suggestions on how you'd prefer the terrarium furniture to function in future updates!

reviews.review_title: Cutest and challenging at same time
reviews.review_description: 25 0ff linkt (DOT) ee / serenitees24 , now u won't hav a reason to not get it now yall which it's well worth what it's priced BUT my baskets aren't showing up in the closet and or the  terrarium so can't add any at all or take to stor them there so fix that and I dnt hav any complaints at all ty and  great job devs

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you so much for letting me know, and sorry you experienced a bug! Is the tutorial broccoli still showing up in the Terrarium? If so, you might have a broken save file, which you can fix by restarting your game. Feel free to email me at liza@meepengine.com if there's any more info you can provide about this bug so I can fix it, or if you have other questions or complaints at all! Thanks so much for playing! ❤️

reviews.review_description: Absolutely love this little game! The veggies are so cute and the gameplay loop of trying to catch and collect the veggies you need is super fun and addictive. I also love that you unlock more features as you play (including the Terrarium and Crafting Room) that allow you to raise and customize your favourite veggie buddies.

reviews.review_title: Fun, cute, and simple but challenging!
reviews.review_description: This is a game that's simple enough to grasp and relax while playing but challenging enough to try and unlock everything and catch the right things. My daughter and I have a blast playing and she's totally addicted trying to catch everything she needs! Would love to see this graduate from the app lab and take off!

Really funny and charming game, that's also addicting. Lets you play sitting down or standing. You can play with one-hand or with both hands. Really well designed! I'll come back later and describe more.
My daughter (7) and I love playing this game. Tons of fun! Creative controls using a watch for different items.

reviews.review_title: A game that will cheer you up!
reviews.review_description: This game is incredibly fun and cute. All these little vegetables make this game perfect for relaxation and distraction. If you feel bad, this will almost certainly cheer you up.
This is a wonderful timewaster when you just feel like feeding a bunch a cute little animals
Good for when you are brain-fried, anxious, or just need to relax! Almost ASMR-ish in some ways. Very cute and a fun distraction!
this game is perfect and adorable. 10/10 would reccomend to anyone who likes to relax
This game helps me relieve my stress. It’s amazing!
